title: Sprinter Modpack
description: This is the official modpack for the Sprinter MTR Server. It is focused on creating a great environment for people to develop transport systems, work together or make their own railway companies in this newly made MTR server.
body:
# Sprinter Modpack
## Overview
Welcome to Sprinter, your new favourite train modpack for the Sprinter MTR Server. With mods like MTR, Paladin's Furniture, Chipped and much more, you can make stations and buildings how you want. These mods add many new block variants, new blocks entirely, trains, tracks and decoration blocks. Along with a lot of resource packs to improve your MTR experience, this is the next MTR train modpack.
## The Story of Sprinter
Sprinter is an MTR server founded on the 21st of August 2024 by BootsXA and TruckManiac. Its goal is to improve the MTR experience by compiling some of the best and most well-liked and known mods on top of MTR plus its add-ons.

## Essential Notice
### Use In Content
You may add your client-side mods to this modpack. If you include this modpack in a video (basically, if you make a video on the Sprinter server), please credit the Sprinter server with a link to the discord.
**IF A RESOURCE PACK IS ADDED AND IS MADE BY YOU AND HAS NO CREDIT, LET US KNOW AND WE WILL ADD IT IN RESOURCE PACK MAKERS LIST IN CREDITS. NO RESOURCE PACK GOES UNCREDITED.**
### Use Of Modpack
You may use this modpack for your single-player projects. Do not use this modpack for your own MTR server, this is strictly prohibited.
### Support
If any issues occur with the modpack, DM BootsXA or TruckManiac. We will do our best to sort out your issue.

## Credits
### Resource Pack Makers
     BVG Class H by CinderanceOTS. Check out their other RPs such as the S-Stock on the MTR                                                                                   Discord.
     S43-Tec LRT Pack by S43_Gaming. Check out the trains made by S43 in this resource pack for light rail transit or trams!
     MTR FGV Trains by JCIBravo. This resource pack adds trains from the Spanish railway company FGV.
     British Rail Classes 507 & 508 pack by Navi_LX9702. Check out the 323 & 157 pack by Navi_LX on their modrinth page!
     IVR - KCR Modern Sign Pack by Ukfa. This adds very slick and modernised KCR Railway Signs.
### Founders
BootsXA
TruckManiac
